name: George S. Patton
flavor: Combined Arms (WW2) — reprising the commander of the US Third Army. 'L'audace, l'audace, toujours l'audace.' Relentless offensive speed: attack, attack, never let up. Rewards sustained aggression.

orderAction.name: Command
orderAction.summary: Play 1 Command token on one of your units currently in play.
